remarks: Exceptional investment opportunity in a highly convenient Stamford location! This unique mixed use property features three residential units plus a commercial space, offering multiple streams of income and outstanding flexibility for investors and owner-occupants alike. The residential units include a spacious 2 bedroom apartment, a 1 bedroom apartment, and a studio, providing strong rental potential and a variety of occupancy options. The commercial space adds additional income producing opportunities, making this an attractive addition to any investment portfolio. Whether you're a seasoned investor looking to maximize cash flow or a buyer seeking to offset your mortgage through rental income, this property presents the perfect house hacking opportunity. Off street parking is available for all units, a valuable amenity for both residential and commercial tenants. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, transportation, and major commuter routes, this versatile property combines location, income potential, and flexibility. Don't miss your chance to own a rare mixed use property in one of Stamford's most accessible locations. A must see!
